title: coleus blumei var. telfordii
intro: Coleus blumei var. telfordii, also known as Coleus blumei, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coleus blumei var. telfordii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be dried and used as a culinary herb.
